scope: zero-optimizer qualification of one O(E) dynamic persistent-edge refresh plus fixed 1e-2 orthogonal residual initialization; no path, loss, sampler, radial, angular-order or tensor change

mechanism.edge_refresh: e_ij <- LN[e_ij + Phi(e_ij,eta_ij,RBF(r_ij),P_s h_i,P_t h_j,P_g[t,c,s]_j,P_v[v_i dot n_ij,v_j dot n_ij])]
mechanism.node_leading_factorization: wide node/time/state projections are evaluated once per node before edge gather
mechanism.residual_initialization: orthogonal gain 1e-2 for angular scalar/vector, coordinate edge and adaptive carrier output maps
mechanism.complexity: O(NH+ER) refresh and O(EC) angular moments; no explicit triplets or tensor products

decision_rule.pass: freeze one seed-5705, same-order, same-noise, same-optimizer exact-one-pass coordinate-only training protocol
decision_rule.fail: remove the dynamic refresh/initialization mechanism; do not rescue it with capacity, rank, steps, seed, loss, sampler or simultaneous representation changes
decision_rule.boundary: Qualification cannot change historical H1a failures or authorize slots, reciprocal carriers, joint training, H1b-H6, tensor conditioning, oracle work, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
